prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `79369cc6`.
codex_response:
Implemented `task_79369cc6` end to end. The rule is: find the best recurring mixed `3x3` template containing both `4` and `6`, then copy that template’s `4` positions onto every rotated/reflected window with the same `6` layout, leaving the `6`s unchanged. I discarded the sonnet hint and corrected the opus hint in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_79369cc6/notes.md), because example 3 shows the operative template is not always the pure `4/6` block and its copied yellow cells are not always “all non-6 cells” of that pure block.

No new primitive was needed. Official verification passed `4/4`, the shared build produced `1000` examples, generated verification passed `1000/1000`, and I sanity-checked the first preview sheet.
